mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_role where (#{keyword} = '' or code like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or name like concat(#{keyword}, '%'))
select id, code, name, status, created_date from sys_role where (#{keyword} = '' or code like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or name like concat(#{keyword}, '%')) order by id asc limit #{start}, #{end}
select id, code, name, status, created_date from sys_role where code = #{code}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_role (code, name, status, created_date) values (#{code}, #{name}, 'ACTIVE', now())
mapper.delete: delete from sys_role where id = #{id} and code not in ('ADMIN', 'USER')
mapper.select: select id, code, name, status, created_date from sys_role where status = 'ACTIVE' order by id asc
select count(*) from sys_menu where (#{keyword} = '' or code like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or name like concat(#{keyword}, '%'))

select id, code, name, path, permission_code, sort, status from sys_menu where (#{keyword} = '' or code like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or name like concat(#{keyword}, '%')) order by sort asc, id asc limit #{start}, #{end}
select id, code, name, path, permission_code, sort, status from sys_menu where status = 'ACTIVE' order by sort asc, id asc

select distinct m.id, m.code, m.name, m.path, m.permission_code, m.sort, m.status from sys_menu m join sys_permission p on p.code = m.permission_code join sys_role_permission rp on rp.permission_id = p.id join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = rp.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and m.status = 'ACTIVE' order by m.sort asc, m.id asc
select count(*) from sys_permission where (#{keyword} = '' or code like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or name like concat(#{keyword}, '%'))

select id, code, name, method, path, status from sys_permission where (#{keyword} = '' or code like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or name like concat(#{keyword}, '%')) order by id asc limit #{start}, #{end}
select id, code, name, method, path, status from sys_permission where status = 'ACTIVE' order by id asc

select distinct p.id, p.code, p.name, p.method, p.path, p.status from sys_permission p join sys_role_permission rp on rp.permission_id = p.id join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = rp.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and p.status = 'ACTIVE' order by p.id asc
select p.id, p.code, p.name, p.method, p.path, p.status from sys_permission p join sys_role_permission rp on rp.permission_id = p.id where rp.role_id = #{roleId} order by p.id asc
select id, code, name, method, path, status from sys_permission where method = #{method} and path = #{path} and status = 'ACTIVE' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_login_log (account, status, ip, message, created_date) values (#{account}, #{status}, #{ip}, #{message}, now())
insert into sys_operation_log (account, method, path, status, message, created_date) values (#{account}, #{method}, #{path}, #{status}, #{message}, now())
mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_login_log where (#{keyword} = '' or account like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or status = #{keyword})
select id, account, status, ip, message, created_date from sys_login_log where (#{keyword} = '' or account like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or status = #{keyword}) order by id desc limit #{start}, #{end}
select count(*) from sys_operation_log where (#{keyword} = '' or account like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or path like concat(#{keyword}, '%'))

select id, account, method, path, status, message, created_date from sys_operation_log where (#{keyword} = '' or account like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or path like concat(#{keyword}, '%')) order by id desc limit #{start}, #{end}
select count(*) from sys_config where (#{keyword} = '' or config_key like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or description like concat(#{keyword}, '%'))

select id, config_key, config_value, description, status from sys_config where (#{keyword} = '' or config_key like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or description like concat(#{keyword}, '%')) order by id asc limit #{start}, #{end}
